title: Head Commodity Trade Finance APAC
description:
Your role :

Are you an inspiring leader? Do you have expertise in CTF?

We're looking for someone like that to:

• Assume responsibility for acquisition, relationship management, and profitability of CTF APAC

• Manage and develop a diversified portfolio of Energy, Metals, and Soft clients

• Be a role model and inspiring leader in developing business relationships and negotiations internationally

• Develop and facilitate cross selling efforts over the portfolio (IB-CCS, FX, WM)

• Ensure continuous balance and optimization of the risk return couple

• Work cross divisionally with Global WM and Investment Bank to develop One Bank synergies

Your team :

You’ll be heading our CTF APAC team specializing in providing trading houses with professional advisory and financing solutions. We’re part of CIC APAC, located in Singapore as an extension to the CIC International & Transaction Services servicing clients globally. This role will report directly to the Global Head Commodity Trade Finance (CTF) in Switzerland and the Head CIC APAC in Singapore.

Your expertise :

You have:

• successful track record and/or excellent expert knowledge of Commodity Trade business and its financial solutions

• detailed understanding of the specificities of the Energy, Metals and Soft industry and industrial value chain. Understanding of the Asia Pacific landscape is advantageous

• experience in leading, coaching, and inspiring teams towards a commercially driven organization

• a knack for structured problem-solving and hands on risk management

You are:

• an excellent communicator and negotiator, with strong interpersonal skills

• fluent in English, additional language proficiency relevant to the role such as Chinese is an asset

• customer oriented with keen interest in business development

• resilient, drive towards goals and work well under pressure

postedCompany.description:
UBS is the world’s largest and only truly global wealth manager. We operate through four business divisions: Global Wealth Management, Personal & Corporate Banking, Asset Management and the Investment Bank. Our global reach and the breadth of our expertise set us apart from our competitors.

With more than 70,000 employees, we have a presence in all major financial centers in more than 50 countries. Do you want to be one of us?

At UBS, we embrace flexible ways of working when the role permits. We offer different working arrangements like part-time, job-sharing and hybrid (office and home) working. Our purpose-led culture and global infrastructure help us connect, collaborate, and work together in agile ways to meet all our business needs.

From gaining new experiences in different roles to acquiring fresh knowledge and skills, we know that great work is never done alone. We know that it's our people, with their unique backgrounds, skills, experience levels and interests, who drive our ongoing success.

Together we’re more than ourselves. Ready to be part of #teamUBS and make an impact?
postedCompany.name: UBS AG
